name: N-3 node detectors: every N-3 detector honors the --paths flag per the §2.2 detector contract
command: for d in boundary-schema console-in-src fetch-timeout naked-throw supply-chain; do grep -q -- '--paths' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo all_paths 1>&2
